Guideline / Visual Design System

Visual UI System

The complete visible representation of AIPOCH components. Every rule is demonstrated strictly via live HTML components.

1. Typography

H1 Hero text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-normal tracking-tight

We create moments for medical research.

H2 Section text-4xl font-light tracking-tight

Support Your Research 24/7 with Agents.

H3 Card Title text-xl font-medium

Connect with OpenClaw

Body Text text-sm leading-relaxed text-gray-600

AIPOCH is an OpenClaw plugin providing medical research agent skills. Explore structured AI agent skills for evidence insights, protocol design, data analysis, and academic writing in scientific research workflows.

Caption / System (Mono) text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-widest
v2.4.1 - System Initiated successfully

2. Color System

Brand Palette

Extracted from the live AIPOCH homepage: monochrome-first surfaces, editorial black typography, and a restrained warm yellow highlight.

Primary / Highlight

#F1DD67

Use sparingly for brand emphasis, highlighted keywords, and a single focal CTA per view.

Secondary / Ink

#111111

Default color for headlines, high-priority text, strong borders, and primary controls.

Neutral / Canvas System

4 values
Canvas#FFFFFF
Surface#F7F7F4
Line#E7E5DE
Muted / Disabled#B4B4AE

Primary Scale

Highlight / Light #F8F2C8

Soft wash for subtle emphasis backgrounds, highlighted notes, or low-pressure callouts.

Highlight / Default #F1DD67

Default brand accent for key highlighted words, branded actions, and guided attention.

Highlight / Strong #D4BF45

Use for hover and active emphasis on brand accents. Avoid large surfaces to keep the system restrained.

Neutral Roles

Canvas

Default page background and high-contrast content area.

#FFFFFF
Surface

Quiet section background, card grouping, and subtle separation from the canvas.

#F7F7F4
Line / Border

Grid lines, dividers, input outlines, and low-noise UI structure.

#E7E5DE
Muted Text

Supporting copy, captions, metadata, secondary labels, and disabled-forward content.

#6B6B66

Semantic Colors

subtle, clinical, non-saturated
Success #3E7A63

Completion, verified states, passed checks, healthy integrations.

Warning #A9772A

Needs review, cautionary notes, incomplete but recoverable states.

Error #A15454

Invalid input, failed processes, blocked flows, or critical research warnings.

Info #4B6778

Context, system guidance, research notes, and neutral status communication.

Usage Guidelines

Backgrounds

Default page canvas #FFFFFF
Section or grouped UI surface #F7F7F4
Dark technical shell / command context #111111

Keep large surfaces neutral. Use yellow only as a focused accent, not as a background system.

Text Hierarchy

Headlines, core UI labels, key numbers #111111
Supporting copy and descriptions #6B6B66
System labels, disabled, tertiary detail #B4B4AE

Do not use semantic colors for main body text. Keep reading surfaces monochrome-first for research clarity.

UI States

Hover accent strong
Active ink + reduced elevation
Disabled muted neutral

Hover may intensify the accent, but active and disabled states should still preserve strong contrast and legibility.

Accent Discipline

Use the brand yellow for highlighted language, a primary CTA, or one key moment in a module.

Keep semantic colors reserved for status, validation, and research-state signals rather than decorative emphasis.

Favor black, white, and grayscale for structure. The system should feel clinical, minimal, and calm.

Application Examples

Dark Technical Surface

Medical Analysis Engine

Use Ink for focused tools, terminal moments, and high-attention environments. Contrast comes from white text and a single highlight action.

curl -X POST /api/run Execute
Light Research Surface

Protocol Summary

Light surfaces stay neutral and readable. Semantic color appears only as a compact status signal.

AIPOCH Protocol v2

3. Icon System

Lucide Core

24x24 frame, 2px stroke, outline only.

4. Buttons & UI Components

Button Styles

Primary Solid
Secondary Outline
Primary Brutal

Structural Cards & Chips

Neutral Tag Warning Tag

Financial Analysis

Structured review and summary output.

5. Spacing & Grid Definition

Padding: p-8 (32px)
Gap: gap-12 (48px)
Element 1
Element 2

12-Column Desktop Grid max-w-6xl

Visual Hero / col-span-8

6. Social Media (4:5)

Post Composition Rules

Designed strictly for vertical feeds (LinkedIn, IG). Requires absolute typographic centeredness with extreme safe margins.

Safe Padding p-12 / p-16
Logo / URL Root absolute bottom-8
Safe Zone

Unlock
Medical
Intelligence

AIPOCH Protocol v2.4

AIPOCH

7. Banner Systems (2:1 / 3:1)

LinkedIn Cover & Web Heros

Web / Horizontal

The new standard for clinical data agents.

Deploy fully verified medical AI skills in seconds. Completely private.

8. Image Style Definition

1. Abstract Over Literal

Use gradients, geometry, and UI mockups instead of generic stock photos of laboratories.

Heavy Noise

2. Cold Textures

Introduce film grain and digital artifacts to ground the imagery in an authentic software feel.

3. Component Floating

Isolate UI components with crisp borders on stark neutral backgrounds.

9. Copy Tone Application

Hero Headlines

Deploy Medical AI Models Locally.

Calm & Factual

The ULTIMATE Med-Tech Revolution!

Hyped & Desperate

CTA & Micro-Copy

Verbs must be action-oriented and clinical (Start, View, Analyze, Deploy). Avoid casual verbs like "Grab", "Check Out", or "See".
